title: Need Assistance With Custom Features
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am looking to hire a developer to help us create custom features for our Monday platform. 
that would include copying date from mirrored columns to standard text fields. 
Ability to have dynamic lists on forms and…

posts.author: markharper (Mark Harper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am looking to hire a developer to help us create custom features for our Monday platform.
that would include copying date from mirrored columns to standard text fields.
Ability to have dynamic lists on forms and various other enhancmenets.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @markharper

Welcome to the community!

upstream can help. While a multi-award winning Platinum Partner, we also have a full stack dev team in house, who specialise in custom requirements like yours.

Please use this link to schedule in a suitable time we can discuss your requirements further - both myself and a technical party from the dev team will join the call.

Feel free to reach me directly if preferred - peta@upstreamtech.io

Thanks and kind regards,
Peta Bolger
Services Consultant at upstream
+61 3 9067 5611

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @markharper

I’d be happy to discuss your requirements and needs. Our team offers custom development options for your monday.com account.

However Regarding some of the requirements you mentioned there is a great app for forms called ‘super forms’ : https://monday.com/marketplace/10000034 This would certainly allow for dynamic lists on forms.

But if you’d like to discuss for other custom add-ons please schedule some time with me here: Calendly - Tim Little

I look forward to chatting!

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark,

I am a certified monday developer and my team to do the needful for you.

Would love to connect and know more about your requirement.

Feel free to reach out at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar
